testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart", "Cart Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression Scenario: Add product to cart # src/test/resources/features/CartCheckout.feature:10 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() ✅ Added product. Remove buttons: 1 When User adds products to cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_adds_products_to_cart() After reload → 'Remove from cart': 1 | 'Add to cart': 8 ✅ Success: Product verified in cart. Then Product should appear in cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.product_should_appear_in_cart()
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: runScenario["Remove product from cart", "Cart Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression Scenario: Remove product from cart # src/test/resources/features/CartCheckout.feature:15 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() ✅ Added product. Remove buttons: 1 When User adds products to cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_adds_products_to_cart() 'Remove from cart' buttons: 1 ✅ Removed. Add buttons now: 9 And User removes product from cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_removes_product_from_cart() After reload → 'Remove from cart': 0 | 'Add to cart': 9 ✅ Success: Cart is empty. Then Cart should be empty # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.cart_should_be_empty()

testcase.name: runScenario["Registered user can reset password", "Forgot Password functionality"](3)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @ForgotPassword Scenario: Registered user can reset password # src/test/resources/features/ForgotPassword.feature:7 Given User is on Forgot Password page # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userIsOnForgotPasswordPage() When User enters registered email "chyranajit@gmail.com" # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userEntersRegisteredEmail(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Submit button # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userClicksOnSubmitButton() ✅ ForgotPassword success msg [text=/reset/i]: Reset Password Then User should see success message "Password reset successfully" # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userShouldSeeSuccessMessage(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Unregistered user cannot reset password", "Forgot Password functionality"](4)
testcase.system-out: @regression @ForgotPassword Scenario: Unregistered user cannot reset password # src/test/resources/features/ForgotPassword.feature:14 Given User is on Forgot Password page # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userIsOnForgotPasswordPage() When User enters unregistered email "chyranajitgmail.com" # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userEntersUnregisteredEmail(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Submit button # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userClicksOnSubmitButton() ✅ Found error keyword in page body Then User should see error message "Please enter a valid email address" # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userShouldSeeErrorMessage(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid credentials", "Login Functionality"](5)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @Login Scenario: Login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:10 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() When User enters valid username and password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.login_valid() Login URL check: https://practice.qabrains.com/ → PASSED Then User should be logged in successfully # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.verify_login()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid credentials", "Login Functionality"](6)
testcase.system-out: @regression @Login Scenario: Login with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:15 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() When User enters invalid username and password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.login_invalid() ✅ Login error detected via: [class*='error'], [class*='invalid'] Then Error message should be displayed # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.verify_error()

testcase.name: runScenario["Logged in user should be able to logout", "Logout Functionality"](7)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @Logout Scenario: Logged in user should be able to logout # src/test/resources/features/Logout.feature:11 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() Login URL check: https://practice.qabrains.com/ → PASSED And User is logged in # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_is_logged_in() 🔓 Logout প্রক্রিয়া শুরু হচ্ছে... 🔍 Strategy 1: সরাসরি Logout বাটন খোঁজা হচ্ছে... ⚠️ Strategy 1 ব্যর্থ। 🔍 Strategy 2: Dropdown trigger খোঁজা হচ্ছে... 🖱️ Trigger পাওয়া গেছে: [aria-expanded] ✅ Dropdown খুলে Logout বাটন পাওয়া গেছে। ✅ Logout redirect সম্পন্ন। Current URL: https://practice.qabrains.com/?logged=true When User clicks on logout button # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_clicks_on_logout_button() Then User should be logged out successfully # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_should_be_logged_out_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Successful user registration with valid email", "User Registration"](8)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @Registration Scenario: Successful user registration with valid email # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:11 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() And User is on homepage # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_is_on_homepage() When User navigates to registration page # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_navigates_to_registration_page() 📧 Registering with email: testuser1779935996411@mailtest.com And User enters valid registration details with email "chyranajit@gmail.com" # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_valid_registration_details_with_email(java.lang.String) 📄 Page after register (first 400 chars): #nprogress{pointer-events:none}#nprogress .bar{background:#091DBD;position:fixed;z-index:1600;top: 0;left:0;width:100%;height:2px}#nprogress .peg{display:block;position:absolute;right:0;width:100px;height:100%;box-shadow:0 0 10px #091DBD,0 0 5px #091DBD;opacity:1;-webkit-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);-ms-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,- 🌐 URL after register: https://practice.qabrains.com/registration And User clicks on register button # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_button() 🔍 Checking success. URL: https://practice.qabrains.com/registration ✅ Found success keyword: confirm Then User should be registered successfully # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_should_be_registered_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Registration should fail with invalid email", "User Registration"](9)
testcase.system-out: @regression @Registration Scenario: Registration should fail with invalid email # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:18 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() And User is on homepage # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_is_on_homepage() When User navigates to registration page # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_navigates_to_registration_page() 📧 Registering with email: chyranajitgmail.com And User enters registration details with email "chyranajitgmail.com" # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_registration_details_with_email(java.lang.String) 📄 Page after register (first 400 chars): #nprogress{pointer-events:none}#nprogress .bar{background:#091DBD;position:fixed;z-index:1600;top: 0;left:0;width:100%;height:2px}#nprogress .peg{display:block;position:absolute;right:0;width:100px;height:100%;box-shadow:0 0 10px #091DBD,0 0 5px #091DBD;opacity:1;-webkit-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);-ms-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,- 🌐 URL after register: https://practice.qabrains.com/registration And User clicks on register button # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_button() HTML5 validation: Please include an '@' in the email address. 'chyranajitgmail.com' is missing an '@'. Then Email validation error message should be displayed # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.email_validation_error_message_should_be_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["R-01 Add multiple products to cart", "Regression Test Suite"](10)

failure.message: ❌ No products found in cart after adding expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: ❌ No products found in cart after adding expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.products_should_be_added_successfully(CommonSteps.java:78) at ✽.Products should be added successfully(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/QaBrainsAutomationPlaywright/src/test/resources/features/RegressionTests.feature:10)
testcase.system-out: @regression Scenario: R-01 Add multiple products to cart # src/test/resources/features/RegressionTests.feature:7 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() ✅ Added product. Remove buttons: 1 When User adds products to cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_adds_products_to_cart() Then Products should be added successfully # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.products_should_be_added_successfully() java.lang.AssertionError: ❌ No products found in cart after adding expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.products_should_be_added_successfully(CommonSteps.java:78) at ✽.Products should be added successfully(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/QaBrainsAutomationPlaywright/src/test/resources/features/RegressionTests.feature:10)

testcase.name: runScenario["R-02 Update product quantity", "Regression Test Suite"](11)
testcase.system-out: @regression Scenario: R-02 Update product quantity # src/test/resources/features/RegressionTests.feature:13 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() Product quantity updated When User updates product quantity # stepdefinitions.RegressionSteps.user_updates_product_quantity() Verifying updated quantity: expected=0, actual=0 Then Quantity should be updated # stepdefinitions.RegressionSteps.quantity_should_be_updated()

testcase.name: runScenario["R-03 Search invalid item", "Regression Test Suite"](12)
testcase.system-out: @regression Scenario: R-03 Search invalid item # src/test/resources/features/RegressionTests.feature:19 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() Invalid item searched When User searches for invalid item # stepdefinitions.RegressionSteps.user_searches_for_invalid_item() No search result displayed Then No result should be displayed # stepdefinitions.RegressionSteps.no_result_should_be_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["S-01 Verify Home page loads", "Smoke Test Suite"](13)
testcase.system-out: @smoke Scenario: S-01 Verify Home page loads # src/test/resources/features/SmokeTests.feature:7 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() Then Home page should load successfully # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.home_page_should_load_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["S-02 Verify navigation links", "Smoke Test Suite"](14)
testcase.system-out: @smoke Scenario: S-02 Verify navigation links # src/test/resources/features/SmokeTests.feature:12 Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() ⚠ Could not find nav link: 'Catalog' 📋 All links on the page: → [(Practice Site)] href=/ → [Home] href=/ → [QA Topics] href=https://qabrains.com/topics → [Discussion] href=https://qabrains.com/discussion → [Tags] href=https://qabrains.com/tags → [Jobs] href=https://qabrains.com/jobs → [Practice Site] href=https://qabrains.com/practice-site → [About Us] href=https://qabrains.com/about → [Sign In] href=https://qabrains.com/auth/login → [] href=https://qabrains.com → [Discussion] href=https://qabrains.com/discussion → [About Us] href=https://qabrains.com/about → [Terms & Conditions] href=https://qabrains.com/terms → [Privacy Policy] href=https://qabrains.com/policy → [] href=https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/qabrainscom → [] href=https://www.facebook.com/qabrainscom → [] href=https://www.youtube.com/@QABrains → [support@qabrains.com] href=mailto:support@qabrains.com ✅ Found nav link 'About' via: nav a:has-text('About') ⚠ Could not find nav link: 'Blog' 📋 All links on the page: → [(Practice Site)] href=/ → [Home] href=/ → [QA Topics] href=https://qabrains.com/topics → [Discussion] href=https://qabrains.com/discussion → [Tags] href=https://qabrains.com/tags → [Jobs] href=https://qabrains.com/jobs → [Practice Site] href=https://qabrains.com/practice-site → [About Us] href=https://qabrains.com/about → [Sign In] href=https://qabrains.com/auth/login → [] href=https://qabrains.com → [Discussion] href=https://qabrains.com/discussion → [About Us] href=https://qabrains.com/about → [Terms & Conditions] href=https://qabrains.com/terms → [Privacy Policy] href=https://qabrains.com/policy → [] href=https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/qabrainscom → [] href=https://www.facebook.com/qabrainscom → [] href=https://www.youtube.com/@QABrains → [support@qabrains.com] href=mailto:support@qabrains.com When User clicks on Catalog, About and Blog # stepdefinitions.SmokeSteps.user_clicks_on_catalog_about_and_blog() Then Pages should navigate correctly # stepdefinitions.SmokeSteps.pages_should_navigate_correctly()
